title: 日本ダービーにむけて

text_block_list.text:
Today is the Japanese Derby, and tens of
thousands of fans have packed into the Tokyo
Racecourse for this event.

They're all here to see last month's top three of
the Satsuki Sho—the so-called "BNW."

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
"From two major prospects to three, Biwa
Hayahide, Narita Taishin, and Winning Ticket
have entered the hearts of many as fan favorites."

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Wow, they even gave us an acronym. "BNW,"
huh?
choice_data_list: You've got a lot of eyes on you now.
You've got a lot of eyes on you now.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Hm, there certainly were more reporters than
usual at last week's public training session, but...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! She's been turning down interviews and
refusing to talk with fans, right?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
It's weird. She's not acting like the Tickezo we all
know and love.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
choice_data_list: If you're worried about something, talk to me.
If you're worried about something, talk to me.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
It's nothing serious. I just feel nervous, like when
I'm waiting for my test to be handed back.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
It's like when you don't know the right answer to a
question and you can't stop thinking about it.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: But I know my winning equation must lead to a solution. And I intend to find the best answer that I can in this race.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: (The strange feeling I had at the Satsuki Sho...)

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: (The strange feeling I've had since the Satsuki Sho...)

text_block_list.name: Spectator
text_block_list.text:
You can do it, Ticket! I know you can become the
Derby Champion!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Got that right! Just you watch me win this!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: (...I'd better focus on the race right now.)
